As head of the Half-A-Chance Ranch for wayward boys, Roy fights to protect the home from ruthless outlaws and shady schemers. When rough-and-tumble gunman Jesse teams up with mild-mannered preacher Lester, the unlikely duo sets out to claim an inheritance that could change their lives. But standing in their way are outlaws, double-crosses, and plenty of misadventures on the trail. Blending sharp humor, action, and classic Western style, this buddy adventure proves that opposites can make the wildest partners.

programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: Coral Reefs: Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: An international scientific team travels to the Chagos Archipelago, a tropical paradise in the Indian Ocean, to study one of the planet’s healthiest coral reefs. Initially, they’re thrilled with the reef’s beauty and abundance. But in the space of just a few weeks they witness a serious case of bleaching…evidence that even the earth’s most isolated places aren’t safe from the ravages of climate change

programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.
